# Cisco Security Cloud Control API

Welcome to the Cisco Security Cloud Control API.

Security Cloud Control is a security platform that allows you to manage your security products and achieve security outcomes from a single integrated interface.

Within Security Cloud Control, user and group management occurs at the platform level. Roles are assigned to these users and admin groups to define their privileges for administering Security Cloud Control and the integrated products.

The Security Cloud Control API enables you to programmatically access Security Cloud Control functionality using a REST architecture.

## What can you do with it?

- Manage organizations, including creating managed and standalone organizations.
- Manage software subscriptions for these organizations.
- Manage users and admin groups within organizations.
- Manage roles for users.
- Manage network objects or groups.

## Products You Can Integrate with Security Cloud Control

- AI Defense
- Security Cloud Control Firewall Management
- Multicloud Defense
- Secure Access
- Secure Workload

This API uses standard HTTP methods and response codes.
